fragments.full_text: Keep runtime deterministic. Stable ranking and retrieval outputs help debugging and trust.

fragments.summary: Require exhaustive fragment feedback before edits.
fragments.full_text: Require exhaustive fragment feedback before edits. Retrieval changes should keep fragment-level verdict coverage explicit.
Validate packet before commit. Check selected fragments and state before finishing work.

fragments.summary: Use direct Dolt reads for high-frequency polling.
fragments.full_text: Use direct Dolt reads for high-frequency polling. Retrieval paths that repeat rapidly should avoid extra wrapper overhead.
Serve cached snapshot from middleware. Some read paths should use cached last-known-good state to stay responsive.

fragments.summary: Expose live, stale, and error states explicitly.
fragments.full_text: Expose live, stale, and error states explicitly. Operators need to know freshness before trusting retrieval output.

fragments.summary: Separate current packet from full fragment store.
fragments.full_text: Separate current packet from full fragment store. Packet context and total memory answer different questions.

fragments.summary: Canonical design lives in schema and plan docs.
fragments.full_text: Canonical design lives in schema and plan docs. Use docs as source of truth for design-shape questions.

fragments.summary: Start gap audits from docs before tests.
fragments.full_text: Start gap audits from docs before tests. Tests show behavior, but docs define intended design shape.

fragments.summary: Stop before long benchmark if orientation is unresolved.
fragments.full_text: Stop before long benchmark if orientation is unresolved. Long expensive work needs an explicit go/no-go check.
Surface open questions before action. Unresolved questions should remain visible when work could drift.

fragments.summary: Weak corpus quality can mask selector quality.
fragments.full_text: Weak corpus quality can mask selector quality. Retrieval failures sometimes come from inventory quality, not only ranking logic.
